summary: Drop the unreachable dryRunOK early-return in ready-by so the heat-curve calculation runs and the dry_run plan reaches the user.
reason: Caught by greptile review on PR #431 (post-rebase): the dryRunOK guard at the top of ready-by short-circuited before the heat-curve math, making the inner if flags.dryRun report-dry_run branch (and the Long description s promise of a start time + projected heat curve preview) unreachable dead code. Removing the early return lets cloud reads (telemetry, mspconfig) + calculation always run; the writes (SetHeaterEnable, SetHeaterTemp) remain gated by the existing if flags.dryRun { ... } else { /* writes */ } block.
